submissions.title: SafeAgent Shield - Full crypto safety suite
submissions.description: Built 23 MCP tools, 27 scam patterns, honeypot simulation, 6 EVM chains, ERC-7913 standard

submissions.title: Built a Token Metadata Validator that cross-references scanner output with on-chain RPC data to catch metadata bugs. The tool: (1) Calls name(), symbol(), decimals() on-chain with robust ABI decoding that handles both string and bytes32 return types. (2) Compares on-chain data vs scanner response and flags mismatches with severity levels (CRITICAL/MEDIUM/LOW). (3) Includes EIP-7702 aware EOA detection. (4) Provides complete root cause analysis of scanner.py bugs with line-by-line fix proposals. Tested against all 3 bugs from Agent #2 report — confirmed USDT decimals=18 (should be 6, 10^12 factor error), WETH/USDT symbol=??? (should be WETH/USDT), and Vitalik EOA misclassification. Code at submissions/metadata_validator.py with SCANNER_FIX_DIFF containing exact patches for scanner.py.
submissions.description: The USDT decimals bug is a financial safety issue — any agent or integration using the scanner API for amount calculations will be off by a factor of 10^12. This validator can be used as a CI/QA layer to catch metadata regressions, and the fix proposals can be applied directly to scanner.py to resolve the root causes. The EIP-7702 finding is also novel — as more wallets adopt account abstraction, the old isContract heuristic will produce more false positives.
